payload.answer: The article at https://example.com/missing could not be retrieved due to a 404 network error. No memory was stored from the source.

entity_resolution.reason: No resolvable entities were successfully fetched or validated; URL returned 404.

memory_cards.statement: Attempted to fetch article at https://example.com/missing for memory architecture purposes, but received a 404 network error.

details: HTTP 404 Not Found encountered during fetch
No content retrieved to process or store
Memory card created to log the failure event for audit and debugging

repair_options: Verify the URL for typos or incorrect path
Check if the resource has been moved or deleted
Attempt access via alternative endpoints or archives (e.g., Wayback Machine)
Contact the content provider for restoration or alternative access
